text: ﬁf&&*ELB Evolution O trssitisencanitio. (@) sivarcarnt * 3 Types of load balancers (ELB) available within AWS ¢ Split between v1 (avoid / migrate) and v2 (prefer) e Classic Load Balancer (CLB) - v1 - Introduced in 2009 * Not really layer 7, lacking features, 1 SSL per CLB e Application Load Balancer (ALB) - v2 - HTTP/S/WebSocket ¢ Network Load Balancer (NLB) - v2 - TCP, TLS & UDP ¢ V2 = faster, cheaper, support target groups and rules
